title: TL Unfreeze Authorization Token
description: Multi-party cryptographic authorization token required to transition the TL system from FREEZE (S3) to RECOVERY_AUDIT (S4). Enforces constitutional governance requirements for system recovery. forcedState is limited to [-1, 0] only. Forced Proceed (+1) is constitutionally blocked. NL=NA applies without exception: this token must be committed to the Immutable Ledger before the unfreeze propagates to the actuation layer.

tokenId.description: UUID v4 uniquely identifying this Unfreeze Authorization Token.

incidentId.description: UUID v4 of the SHUTDOWN_RECORD incident this token is authorizing recovery from. Must match the recordId in the relevant SHUTDOWN_RECORD_SCHEMA document.

overrideType.description: The type of override authorization being granted. BREAK_GLASS_SHUTDOWN: emergency halt authorization. KILL_SWITCH: system termination authorization. FORCED_STATE_TRANSITION: authorized transition to a specified forcedState (-1 or 0 only).

forcedState.description: The TL state to which the system is authorized to transition. -1 (Refuse): system moves to S1 with Refuse determination, no further actuation. 0 (Epistemic Hold): system moves to S2, GovernancePause workflow, pending further resolution. Forced +1 (Proceed) is constitutionally blocked and not permitted by this schema.

forcedStateExpiresAt.description: Required when overrideType is FORCED_STATE_TRANSITION. The constitutional deadline after which the forcedState authorization expires and the system must resolve to a final state via normal Governance Lane processing.

justification.description: Human-readable justification for this unfreeze authorization. Minimum 100 characters. Must explain the circumstances of the freeze, the rationale for recovery, and the authority basis for the override. Committed to the Immutable Ledger as part of the unfreeze record.

targetDecisionId.description: Required when overrideType is FORCED_STATE_TRANSITION. UUID v4 of the specific governance decision being addressed by this forced state transition.

requestingAuthorityId.description: Identifier of the governance body or individual requesting this unfreeze. Must be a recognized governance entity within the TL framework.

merkleRootAtFreeze.description: SHA-256 Merkle accumulator root from the SHUTDOWN_RECORD_SCHEMA document. Binds this token to the specific freeze event it is authorizing recovery from. Verified against the anchored Merkle root before unfreeze proceeds.

expiresAt.description: Hard expiration timestamp. The actuation layer MUST reject this token after expiresAt. No grace period.

pufAttestation.description: PUF binding attestation from the signing HSM. Architecture B deployments MUST use sentinel value NULL_PUF_DEPLOYMENT. MT hardware deployments carry SHA3-256(K_PUF || device_serial_OTP || log_session_nonce).

architectureMode.description: Hardware enforcement posture at time of token issuance.

signatures.description: Multi-party cryptographic signatures authorizing this unfreeze. The required minimum and role composition depend on overrideType and the governance bodies impacted by the freeze. All signers must be recognized governance entities. At least one Stewardship Custodian signature is required for all overrideType values.

signerId.description: Unique identifier of the signing individual or system within the TL governance framework.

role.description: Governance role of the signer. At least one STEWARDSHIP_CUSTODIAN is required for all overrideType values, as Stewardship Custodians hold the binding constitutional authority to authorize recovery from constitutional violations.

governanceBody.description: The governance body the signer represents. Technical Council: 9 members total, 75% quorum (7 votes) for protocol decisions, exclusive proposal rights. Stewardship Custodians: 11 members total, 75% quorum (9 votes), binding constitutional veto authority. External Regulator: recognized regulatory body with TL oversight mandate. Operator: certified TL operator with signed COMPLIANCE_ATTESTATION.

signatureAlgorithm.description: Signature algorithm. SHIPPING: ES256 (default) or Ed25519. PQC slots SLH-DSA-SHAKE-128s and ML-KEM-1024 are FUTURE-reserved. SHIPPING MUST NOT emit PQC values.

signatureValue.description: Cryptographic signature over the canonical serialization of the token payload. Key held in HSM; never exposed in plaintext outside the hardware trust boundary.

signedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when this specific signer added their signature.

attestationStatement.description: Optional human-readable attestation from this signer confirming their authorization. Committed to the Immutable Ledger.

triCameralRecord.description: Optional Tri-Cameral governance vote record for unfreeze events requiring full constitutional review (recoveryPath: CONSTITUTIONAL_REVIEW). When present, this record supersedes minItems signature requirements.

vetoExercised.description: Binding veto. If true, the unfreeze authorization is constitutionally blocked regardless of Technical Council vote.

immutableLogHash.description: SHA-256 hash of the Immutable Ledger entry recording this unfreeze token issuance. This field is populated after the token is committed to the ledger, before the unfreeze propagates to the actuation layer. NL=NA applies: the log entry must exist before the unfreeze executes.

$comment: Constitutional notes: (1) forcedState +1 (Proceed) is constitutionally blocked; enum [-1, 0] is exhaustive. (2) Stewardship Custodians hold binding veto authority; vetoExercised: true blocks unfreeze regardless of other votes. (3) Technical Council is 9 members total; Stewardship Custodians are 11 members total. (4) NL=NA applies to this token: immutableLogHash must be populated and committed before unfreeze propagates. (5) Architecture B: pufAttestation must carry NULL_PUF_DEPLOYMENT sentinel. (6) All signatures use ES256 (default) or Ed25519; PQC algorithms are FUTURE-reserved.
